about.title: — Why was this project created?
about.text: — We made it so that no one ever suffers again from not being able to find merch for their favorite fandom during hyperfixations. So that no one feels alone in their interests, we gather a huge community of like-minded people around us. So that people don't have to run around different stores looking for a gift for a friend, but just come to us. And of course we're here just to bring you joy :)

cart.title: Cart
cart.deliveryText: Fill your cart with items and free delivery will be automatically included!
cart.delivery1: For orders over 1000 ₽: Free delivery by Russian Post to Moscow
cart.delivery2: For orders over 3000 ₽: Free delivery by Russian Post to nearby regions
cart.delivery3: For orders over 5000 ₽: Free delivery to Magadan, Amur, Irkutsk regions, Khabarovsk, Primorsky, Zabaikalsky, Kamchatka territories, Yakutia, Buryatia, Jewish Autonomous Region, Chukotka Autonomous Region

about.title: ATTENTION! Info about us!
about.intro: Hello, universe traveler! Welcome to Fun Universe — a place where pop culture meets pixelated past.
about.text: We are simple people who got tired of looking for merch across different multi-universes, and we want everyone to easily get cool merch. We took old arcade machines, mixed them with love for movies, anime and games, and created this cozy place that will welcome anyone regardless of their favorite universe.
about.project: Fun Universe is a student e-commerce project specializing in selling themed merch from popular universes: movies, games, anime.
about.projectText: The platform is an online store with a unique concept: retro-arcade style design, complemented by game mechanics to increase user engagement. The project was implemented by a team of three developers as part of educational activities.
about.audienceText: young people aged 16 to 30, pop culture fans, geek communities.
about.goalText: creating a functional and aesthetically attractive marketplace with a high level of user engagement.
about.specialText: «Misk» — in the dark, all stats increase by 20%. Find collectibles effortlessly | Never lose in arcade games.

team.member1: Responsible for making the site look like it was found in an abandoned 90s arcade...
team.member2: We cast spells on bugs and make sure the dinosaur runs and the site works smoothly for your enjoyment.
team.member3: We know where that easter egg in «Stranger Things» is, and we ensure print quality and originality.
